title: Ability Tools
description: Ability Tools is a Minecraft mod that adds a bunch of tools, weapons, and armor to the game.
body:
# 🏗️ Ability Tools Ability Tools is a fabric Minecraft mod that adds a bunch of tools, weapons, and armor to the game. ## 💾 Installation Download the mod on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ability-tools) and put it in your mods directory.
This mod requires the [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) ## 🏢 Features
🪓Axes #### ![Picture of an axe](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/experience_axe.png?raw=true) Experience Axe Gives experience when damaging an entity
⚔️Swords #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/ender_sword.png?raw=true) Ender Sword Teleports you forward and gives you speed
10 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/ground_slam_dagger.png?raw=true) Ground Slam Dagger Right-clicking a block (Ground slamming) will damage a 3rd of all entities health in a 5 block radius
45 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/heal_sword.png?raw=true) Heal Sword Heals 4 of your health
10 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/group_heal_sword.png?raw=true) Group Heal Sword Heals every player by 6 health in a 5 block radius
10 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/jump_sword.png?raw=true) Jump Sword Boosts you into the air damaging entities for 4 hearts and freezing them for a second
30 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/money_sword.png?raw=true) Money Sword Does 0.25 extra bonus damage for every level you have #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/multi_sword.png?raw=true) Multi Sword Does 3 damage to all entities in a 5 block radius of the entity you hit. #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/roid_rage_sword.png?raw=true) Roid Rage Sword Does 25 extra damage for 5 seconds
20 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a sword](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/speedy_sword.png?raw=true) Speedy Sword Doubles movement speed for 25 seconds
4 second cooldown
🏹Bows #### ![Picture of a bow](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/aftershock_bow.png?raw=true) Aftershock Bow Applies glowing and damages entities 4 seconds after being shot #### ![Picture of a bow](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/end_bow.png?raw=true) End Bow Teleports you wherever you shoot #### ![Picture of a bow](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/fast_bow.png?raw=true) Fast Bow Instantly draws back #### ![Picture of a bow](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/multi_bow.png?raw=true) Multi Bow Shoots 4 arrows at once. Takes 4 arrows to shoot #### ![Picture of a bow](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/roid_rage_bow.png?raw=true) Roid Rage Bow Does double damage #### ![Picture of a bow](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/tnt_bow.png?raw=true) TNT Bow Explodes on impact
⛏️Pickaxes #### ![Picture of a pickaxe](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/experience_pickaxe.png?raw=true) Experience Pickaxe 1 in 5 chance to give a lot of experience #### ![Picture of a pickaxe](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/progressive_pickaxe.png?raw=true) Progressive Pickaxe Gives a 1% boost in mining speed for every 100 blocks mined #### ![Picture of a pickaxe](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/soul_pickaxe.png?raw=true) Soul Pickaxe Gives 50% more ore per entity near you in a 50 block radius
🪖Armor #### ![Picture of a helmet](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/fortune_helmet.png?raw=true) Fortune Armor When wearing the whole set of armor, you get 2 extra ore #### ![Picture of a helmet](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/miner_helmet.png?raw=true) Miner Armor When wearing the whole set of armor, you get extra mining speed #### ![Picture of a helmet](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/speedy_helmet.png?raw=true) Speedy Armor When wearing the whole set of armor, you get extra movement speed
🌲Misc #### ![Picture of a firey stick](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/fire_stick.png?raw=true) Fire Stick Spawns a circle in a 5 block radius that damages entities in that circle every second
30 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a frozen stick](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/freeze_stick.png?raw=true) Freeze Stick Spawns a circle in a 3 block radius that freezes entities for a second after 2 seconds
30 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a lightning stick](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/lightning_stick.png?raw=true) Lightning Stick On right click, you spawn lightning around you in a 10 block radius. It also spawns lightning when you hit an entity.
5 second cooldown #### ![Picture of a gun](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/roid_rage_gun.png?raw=true) Roid Rage Gun Literally just a gun
#### ![Picture of an ice gun](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/blob/master/src/main/resources/assets/ability-tools/textures/item/ice_gun.png?raw=true) Ice Gun Slows enemies on impact. Does more damage than the Roid Rage Gun
2 second cooldown
## 🔎Contributing Issues are welcome both in my [discord](https://discord.gg/23KfgguXMC) and on [GitHub](https://github.com/chowiekomba/ability-tools/issues) ## 📜License [Custom License](LICENSE)
